visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A middle-aged man with glasses and a black-and-white checkered flat cap is speaking directly to the camera in a bright studio environment. He is wearing a light blue sweatshirt. A logo for 'miko' is in the top left. (2) Close-up shot of a white, extremely long and narrow mechanical keyboard being held horizontally. It features blue edges and standard QWERTY keycaps arranged in a single line. (3) A man in a blue button-down shirt holds the keyboard in a workshop filled with tools and electronic equipment, looking at it with an intrigued expression. (4) An animated sequence shows a blue background with white keyboard keys sliding across the frame. (5) Various scenes of people using the long keyboard: one person stretches their arms wide to type on a desk, another uses it as a walking stick while hiking in a lush green forest, and another uses it to reach for something under a wooden sofa. (6) The original man in the checkered hat returns to the screen, gesturing with his hands as he continues to narrate. (7) The video concludes with the Google logo appearing over a white background with red, yellow, green, and blue accents.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 這絕對是!!. [Logo]: 3c有意思tim哥, @3ctim, miko. (2) [Variety]: 最適合1人使用的鍵盤. (3) [Subtitle]: 先說這並不是愚人節企劃. (4) [Subtitle]: 而是 Google 工程師. (5) [Subtitle]: 耗時數個月打造出來的. (6) [Subtitle]: 長165公分 寬6.4公分的多功能鍵盤. (7) [Subtitle]: 你沒有聽錯. (8) [Subtitle]: 就是一根這麼長的鍵盤啊. (9) [Subtitle]: 社恐人士如果擁有它. (10) [Subtitle]: 上班就能跟左右同事保持距離. (11) [Subtitle]: 除了這個好處以外. (12) [Subtitle]: Google的日本團隊認為說. (13) [Subtitle]: 這種排列方式符合人體的工學. (14) [Subtitle]: 同時也對身體的健康也發揮了一定的幫助. (15) [Subtitle]: 對於長期有固定姿勢的上班族來說. (16) [Subtitle]: 它可以讓你展開雙臂. (17) [Subtitle]: 左右活動腰椎有沒有. (18) [Subtitle]: 此外官方還列舉出多個用途方法. (19) [Subtitle]: 例如你可以來找沙發底下的遺失物. (20) [Subtitle]: 或者是爬山的時候當登山杖. (21) [Subtitle]: 可惜目前沒有實體販售. (22) [Subtitle]: 僅在網站開放原始碼. (23) [Subtitle]: 有興趣的朋友可以下載動手做.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main host, 1 engineer in workshop, 3 different people in demonstration clips.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A man wearing a light blue sweatshirt, a black-and-white checkered flat cap, and clear-framed glasses.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The primary background is a warm-toned studio with soft lighting. Secondary backgrounds include a messy tech workshop, a modern office desk, a green forest trail, and a domestic living room.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a high-energy, cheerful male narrator speaking in Mandarin. An upbeat electronic pop track with a strong, driving beat and bright synth melodies plays at a lower volume in the background. (2) As the narrator describes the dimensions of the keyboard, a subtle 'ding' sound effect emphasizes the numbers shown on screen. The music tempo remains steady and optimistic. (3) During the transition to the clips of the keyboard in use, a quick 'whoosh' sound effect occurs. The narrator's voice maintains a consistently high arousal and positive valence, acting as an enthusiastic guide. (4) The audio concludes with a final 'pop' sound effect as the Google logo appears, while the music fades out alongside the narrator's closing sentence.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Evidence -> Benefit Analysis -> Alternative Use Cases -> Conclusion
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To share a humorous and quirky piece of tech news about an absurdly long keyboard created by Google Japan engineers, highlighting its unusual form factor and mock-serious 'benefits' like physical health and social distancing.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: While Tim is a tech influencer and mentions Google, this video is framed as a commentary on a viral/experimental project rather than a commercial endorsement.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video utilizes a high-energy delivery common in social media tech commentary to engage viewers with an unusual product story.
